name: Better Than Sex Cake/Yellow Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a large bowl and beat with an electric mixer until smooth.
2. Gradually add the next three ingredients to the mixture.
3. Pour the batter into a greased and floured Bundt pan.
4. Bake at 325°F for 55 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Allow the cake to cool completely in the pan before turning it out onto a wire rack.
6. Store the cake tightly covered to maintain freshness.
